title: GitHub Actions: Basic workflow template
body:
name: {{Workflow Name}}

on:
  push:
    branches: [ main ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ main ]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
    
    - name: {{Step Name}}
      run: {{command}}
description: Basic GitHub Actions workflow YAML structure
